memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-20 — NVDA sell-the-news + AMD 6th miss + oil collapse

**3 things that worked:**
1. GLD hedge +1.25% on risk-on day + oil collapse — cross-asset protection confirmed
2. Binary event exclusion correctly applied — no new NVDA entries made (AH -2.44% validates the rule)
3. NVDA beat confirms AI infrastructure thesis — AMD, MU, AVGO all read-through beneficiaries

**3 to improve:**
1. AMD MUST be entered at Market Open May 21 — 6th consecutive failure is unacceptable
2. PLTR conditional entry is NOW triggered ($135 > $134) — MOO May 21 MANDATORY
3. NVDA earnings date was miscalculated (May 20 not May 21) — always verify from primary IR source

### 2026-05-13 — PPI shock + PLTR support break

- April PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected — largest monthly jump since 2022. S&P rose +0.69% anyway.
- PLTR -4.31% ($136→$129.99). $134 support broken. Re-scored 6.50 (Technical 3). SKIP until $134 reclaim.
- AMD pullback from $477 to $448 normalizes RSI to ~60. Re-score 7.33. MUST ENTER.
- 7th consecutive API-blocked routine. AMD MOC attempted 19:42:21Z — HTTP 403.

### 2026-05-01 — Operator-mandated deployment bias correction

- Score ≥ 7 = enter at next routine. Only 3 valid skip exemptions.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **Oil collapse today (-5.66%):** WTI → $98.26, Brent → $105.02. Middle East de-escalation optimism. Positive for equities broadly. Lower inflation trajectory → rate-cut expectations potentially restored.
- **NVDA Q1 FY2027 (tonight):** Revenue $81.62B vs $79.19B (+85% YoY). EPS $1.87 vs $1.76. Q2 guidance $89.18-92.82B vs $87.36B. CEO: 'AI factories — largest infrastructure expansion in human history accelerating.' AH: $217.91 (-$5.56, -2.44%). Third consecutive beat with AH decline.
- **AI infrastructure thesis confirmed:** NVDA data center $39.4B (est) in Q1. HBM memory demand = MU read-through. Custom ASICs = AVGO read-through. Foundry demand = TSM read-through. Agentic AI 'doing productive work.'
- **AMD +6.39% to $440.50:** Strongest single-day move since Q1 earnings (May 5 +16%). AMD has doubled YTD 2026. AI data center CPU + GPU momentum. Score upgraded to 7.50.
- **PLTR ~$135:** Above $134 re-entry trigger. Government AI (AIP) secular revenue. Score 7.33 confirmed. MANDATORY MOO May 21.
- **MU $720.55:** NVDA HBM demand confirmation = direct MU read-through. Score likely ≥7.5 post-NVDA print. Entry zone $720-740.
- **S&P 500:** 7,432.97 (+1.08%). Down from 7,511 all-time high (May 14) after May 15 sell-off. Recovery underway. Portfolio gap vs SPX: -3.04 pp (improved from -3.81 pp).
market.macro_note: Kevin Warsh Fed Chair (hawkish, 20-30% hike odds Dec). Iran war talks advancing (risk-on). AMD Venice 2nm ramp + $10B Taiwan investment (chip sector breakout day). MEMORIAL DAY May 25 — next session May 26.
